あら、司令官様。揉め事でしょうか？: Oh, Lord Commander. Is this a dispute?
お酒を取りに行っている最中、そちらの男性と肩がぶつかってしまい、<br>口論にな:
While I was on my way to get some sake, my shoulder inadvertently
collided with that man's, and we ended up in an argument... I see...
よろしいので？ 殺せば、その男性の口は二度と開きません。<br>司令官様が不快な:
Is that acceptable? If I kill him, that man will never speak again. I
believe it would also spare you any discomfort, Lord Commander...
それでも殺しはダメ、ですか……ふふっ。司令官様は、本当にお優しいですね。<br>:
Even so, killing is not allowed, is it? Fufu. Lord Commander, you are
truly kind. In that case, shall I just knock him out this time?
